Hello and welcome back. Okay, so we're still in our same YouTube ad script framework document So all three of our frameworks are in the same document figured I'd keep them together and this is the framework for an ad where you're selling like stuff like E-commerce stuff or potentially a low-ticket thing like maybe a book or something like that But really this is gonna be exceptionally good for E-com stuff. All right, so this is obviously isn't the ad but this is a ad on Your YouTubes and this is how it looks on desktop. It looks similar on mobile, but they can click like right away You know so imagine, you know, you have someone saying hey, you know You got to try flawless by Katya love and their little picture of the bottle or whatever it is and this little thing says try it now You know and this little banner thingy says flawless by Katya love like they can click on here And so they can go over there and we want them to do that. That's the purpose of the ad You know the ad isn't necessarily to do the selling in this case Although we do want a pre-frame and we want them to already be predisposed to want the product before they get there But our sales page is really meant to do the selling So this is meant to get that quick right on over there And so that will be fabulous if they go ahead and click but of course, you know, not everybody will but just in case They already know okay. So at the end of this sucker All right What I want you to do is have that same level of detail that we talked about in the other scripting in terms of what to expect when you click All right, so I'll pick up with the here's what to do next right so or rather with a segue into it here All right, so just apply it like this see footage is someone you know applying it right before bed and let it go to work on your skin And you know what right now so that was my transition and you know what right now You can try flawless and get free shipping anywhere in the US This is a limited offer so click the button by this ad to get yours now This is where I like to differ from other YouTube advertisers I want them to know what's going to happen when they click over. I'm pre-selling the click here I don't want them to be afraid to click because people you know, I mean they're in the world of clickbait You know what I mean like you really have to reassure people every single step of the way when you can So I might say now when you do you'll be taken to our online store And you'll see a page that looks like this and then of course I would show the landing page That would say now after you place your order you'll get a confirmation email and you'll get your shipping details We usually ship within 24 hours unless you order on a Saturday and All right, and so now we have why to act now You always want to have why to act now right so this free shipping offers limited to go ahead click the link now Okay, and now we have risk reversal Which is a part of any integral pitch and of course we guarantee you love flawless Just try it for 30 days And if your friends don't think you've been on a long vacation next time they see you just let us know and we'll refund your purchase No questions asked then of course you tell them what to do again All right, so go ahead click the button by this video when you do you'll get free shipping anywhere in the USA And then I like to leave the last 10 seconds blank Like just a blank screen with the words click now free shipping or whatever on the screen like with the main offer on the screen okay, so Let me show you an example of an obviously successful Ecom ad and that's this is really what this framework is for is like when you're selling things You know like a thing where you can demonstrate what it is All right, so I want to show you an obviously successful one and I found this by clicking on top advertisers All right, and then I found this video and so whenever I'm using vidTal again, and I'm just using the free version By the way, so I clicked on top advertisers.
